notes: Indicator reference articles (template 1). For EACH: fetch the live article at https://www.deepcharts.com/helpcenter/article/<old-slug> (from source LIVE:<old-slug>; percent-encode parentheses %28 %29 and the registered mark %C2%AE if the fetch fails) and rewrite to: What it is (2-3 plain sentences) / When to use it (3-4 bullets) / Quick start (add to chart + a sensible starter configuration) / How to read it (interpretation guidance!) / Settings reference (EVERY setting from the live article grouped as in the dialog - keep real setting names and any defaults the live article states; NEVER invent settings or defaults; if the live article omits a default just describe the setting) / Tips and common mistakes / Related articles. Add one screenshot placeholder showing the indicator on a chart and one of its settings dialog. Cross-link [[different-types-of-input]] and [[indicator-layout]] in Related, plus the family concept article ([[orderflow-101]] for delta tools, [[understanding-volume-profile]] for profile tools, [[understanding-auction-theory]] for auction tools).
